topic: n8n MCP Integration Guide 2026: Connect Claude and AI Agents to Your Workflows

stats.fact: n8n has surpassed 230,000 active global users as of late 2025
n8n raised $180M in Series C round in October 2025, bringing valuation to $2.5 billion
n8n reached $40 million in ARR in July 2025, multiplying ARR by 5x in one year
n8n MCP server covers 1,650 nodes (820 core + 830 community) with 99% node property coverage
By end of 2026, 40% of enterprise applications expected to include task-specific AI agents, up from <5% in 2025
n8n's execution-based pricing model delivers typical cost savings of 40-60% compared to task-based alternatives like Zapier
AI coding platforms can build n8n workflows 10x to 20x faster with fewer configuration errors using MCP
n8n documentation is synced with latest n8n releases within 48 hours via the MCP server
Vodafone uses n8n for security threat intelligence automation saving approximately £2.2M in operational costs
Delivery Hero automates IT operations with n8n, saving 200 hours of manual work monthly via a single workflow

angles: Two-way MCP integration: n8n as both MCP server (expose your workflows) AND MCP client (consume external tools like Claude, GitHub, Slack MCP servers)
